name: GOV.UK new-child OKF demonstrator
note: Replace both placeholders with absolute paths. The explicit working directory and uv --project binding make this recipe independent of the AI client's launch directory.

placeholders.<BUNDLE_DIRECTORY>: Absolute path to the bundle directory containing okf-explorer.json.
placeholders.<REPOSITORY_CHECKOUT>: Absolute path to the checked-out okf-govuk-content repository.
